title: Peppery Chewy Apple Pilaf
description: A quick-fix Chinese dish featuring apples and pickled vegetables in a peppery sauce, suitable for whole30 diet with minimal added sugars.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons tamari sauce or soy sauce (adjust to taste)

instructions: Wash and dry the apple slices, set aside.
Cut pickled vegetables into thin strips, set aside.
In a large skillet, heat a drizzle of olive oil over medium-high heat. Add ginger and garlic, sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add sliced apples to the skillet with the ginger and garlic, cook for another minute until lightly browned.
Mix in pickled vegetables, red pepper flakes, lemon juice, and tamari sauce. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Reduce heat to medium, simmer for 5-7 minutes or until apple slices are tender but not mushy.
Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves if desired.
